title: 2 Inch Sticky Vinyl Letter Number Stickers, 4 Sheets Self Adhesive Stick On Alphabet Symbol Sticker for Scrapbook, Bottle Decor - Yellow
features: Vinyl Letter Number Sticky Stickers: The sticky letter number sticker is made from vinyl and paper material, ensuring waterproof, oil proof, sun resistant and scratch resistant. The vinyl sticker is strong and not easy to break. The high qualify letter number sticker has strong stickiness and can last for a long time

Self Adhesive Alphabet Stickers for Scrapbook: The stick on letter number sticker is well pre-cut in advance, and it is self adhesive, that is extremely easy to apply and use. Just need to tear off from the backing and stick to the smooth surface, very convenient for use. Plus, it would not leave residue while removing

Widely Application: The letter stickers are suitable for both outdoor and indoor use. There are widely apply on outdoor usages like doors, mailbox, signs, car decorations etc, There are also perfect for decorating personal items like bottle, cup, notebook, pencil case, mobile phones etc. What’s more, there are also a good choice to decor home, office or school. the letter stickers could be consists of meaningful words or sentences

High Definitions: Our capital alphabet stickers are printed in high definitions, which are bright, vivid colour and high definitions, they are last for a long time, keep vivid colour, no fade even under sunlight usage. The yellow colour is eye catching

Package & Size: The package comes with 4 pieces letter number stickers, the size is 22.5*28cm per sheet, and the height of each single letter sticker is 5.1cm/2inch. Package includes 104 pieces single upper letter stickers, 40 pieces number stickers and 52 pieces punctuation stickers. The colour is yellow
description: 2 Inch Waterproof & Scratch Resistant Letter Number Stickers Size of each sheet:22.5*28 cm Size of each single capital letter and number:2 inch Colour: yellow Package Include: 4 Sheets Features: Waterproof, weather proof, tear resistant, fade resistant, scratch resistant, no residue after removing, bright and vivid colour Application: For DIY & Crafts Aims: Scrapbook, Gift Cards, Post Cards, Thank you Cards, Gift Box Decals For Mark Aims: Sign, Note, Classification, Label For Decoration: Door, Mailbox, Menu, Sign Boards
